The '''''Zeplin''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was commanded by [[Namuura Din]], an Imperial [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who followed Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s defection from the Empire shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
Namuura Din had grown sympathetic to the cause of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], so the two sides met to discuss his defection. The ''Zeplin'' met with the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'', and as part of their deal, Din delivered [[Missile Boat]] [[Sealion]] to the Rebel vessel. The Imperials, unwilling to lose such valuable technology to the Alliance, sent a strike force to stop the ''Zeplin'' and the ''Link''.

Unfortunately for the Empire, the ''Link'' escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] with the newly acquired Missile Boat. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] pursued the vessel while ace pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and his force [[Capture of the Zeplin|attacked the ''Zeplin'']]. Flying a Missile Boat, Stele brought down the ''Victory'' Star Destroyer's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] so [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] could disable it. Imperial [[Transport/Legends|transports]] and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']] soon overtook the ''Zeplin'', and Namuura Din was captured. The ''Zeplin'' was then taken to an Imperial shipyard so that it could be inspected.
